case_title: ATKINS,DELIA VS WONG,SAI CAM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $629.30 FILED BY ATKINS,DELIA AS TO DEFENDANT WONG,SAI CAM WONG,CONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-09-1993, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO AUG-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG,SAI CAM
INVALID SERVICE AS TO CONNIE WONG, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WONG,SAI CAM WONG,CONNIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ATKINS,DELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ATKINS,DELIA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-25-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
CERT. LETTER TO DELIA ATKINS RETURNED UNCLAIMED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATKINS,DELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG,SAI CAM WONG,CONNIE $629.30 PRINCIPAL, $157.32 INTEREST, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $801.62, INTEREST FOR 4.5 YEARS AT 5% PER YEAR PLUS REFUND OF SECURITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WONG,SAI CAM WONG,CONNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ATKINS,DELIA DEFTS' $1900 PENDING CLAIM W/ SFHA WILL BE MORE THAN COVER DAMAGES, W/C WERE NOT SHOWN TO BE CAUSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $629.30 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2.51 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WONG,CONNIE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG,SAI CAM WONG,CONNIE
RETURNED/INVALID CHECK ENTERED AS TO TRANSACTION #
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $206.15 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG,SAI CAM WONG,CONNIE
